name: Weaver
description: Fate weaves the threads of our lives together. Fate also wields the blade that cuts them short. Skitskurr, the Weaver.

abilities.name: The Swarm
abilities.description: Launches a swarm of Beetles, that latch on any enemy unit in their path, attacking and reducing the affected enemy units' armor until it is killed. Cast Range: 3000. Max Travel Distance: 3000. Spawn Radius: 300. Beetles Latch Radius: 100. Number of Beetles: 12. Hit Count: 3/4/4/5 (5/6/6/7). Cooldown: 44/36/28/20. Mana Cost: 110.

abilities.name: Shukuchi
abilities.description: As the Weavers worked in the fabric of creation, small wormholes allowed them to slip through time to better work their craft. Fade Time: 0.25. Damage Radius: 175. Damage: 100/130/160/190 (150/180/210/240). Buff Duration: 4. Haste Speed: 550. Debuff Duration: (4.6). Cooldown: 15/12/9/6. Mana Cost: 65.

abilities.name: Geminate Attack
abilities.description: Skitskurr's relationship with time is somewhat variable, causing his actions to be witnessed - and felt - more than once. Cast Range: 425. Number of Extra Attacks: 1 (2). Attack Damage Bonus: 20/35/50/65 (80/95/110/125). Buff Duration: 0.03. Search Radius: (1200). Geminate Attack Instance: (1). Cooldown: 9/7/5/3.

abilities.name: Time Lapse
abilities.description: Enables casting on allied heroes, applying most Time Lapse effects on the unit-targeted allied hero. Reduces cooldown. Lapse Time: 5. Cooldown: 70/55/40. Mana Cost: 150/75/0.
